# TikTok Downloader

> Free online tool to download TikTok videos without watermark in HD quality.

## About
TikTok Downloader allows users to paste a TikTok video URL and download it without the watermark. It also supports extracting the audio and downloading it as an MP3 file.

## Features
- **No Watermark:** Download videos clean, without the TikTok logo.
- **HD Quality:** Videos are downloaded in the highest available quality.
- **MP3 Extraction:** Option to download just the audio track.
- **Free & No Login:** Completely free to use, no registration required.

## How to Use
1. Find a video on TikTok and click "Copy Link".
2. Paste the link into the input field on the homepage.
3. Click the "Download" button.
4. Select your desired format (Video without watermark, HD Video, or MP3 Audio).
